metadata.title: Quran Lookup
metadata.description: This is a Quran Lookup plugin for Obsidian. This replaces chapter:verse shorthand with verse text in arabic and translation.

regex.source: .setDesc("If true, provides translation under the Arabic verse")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，在阿拉伯文经文下方提供译文")

regex.source: .setDesc("If true, removes the added translator content that would normally appear in parenthesis")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，移除通常出现在括号中的译者添加内容")

regex.source: .setDesc("Wraps the Arabic verse in HTML Span CSS, backticks, or None")
regex.target: .setDesc("用 HTML Span CSS、反引号或无来包裹阿拉伯文经文")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select the font family for the Quran text.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择《古兰经》文本的字体系列。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the font size for the Quran text.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置《古兰经》文本的字体大小。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Which container to use for displaying the verses")
